title: README checkbox parity with the work-item manifest

acceptance_criteria.text: validate_repo.py fails when a work-item README that uses the '- [ ] **ID**' checklist convention contradicts the manifest (satisfied criterion left unchecked, pending criterion checked, or a manifest criterion with no checkbox), and stays silent for prose READMEs. Covered by tests.
The change is recorded as decision 0014 and the package version is bumped from 1.5.0 to 1.6.0.
